case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS NAVARRO MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LUIS NAVARRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LUIS NAVARRO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LUIS NAVARRO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 06/05/2019 TO COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCOL. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LUIS NAVARRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BG JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS NAVARRO MARTINEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, LUIS NAVARRO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
